values.name: mail.message.subtype.list
values.arch:
<list string="Subtype">
                    <field name="sequence" widget="handle"/>
                    <field name="name"/>
                    <field name="res_model"/>
                    <field name="default"/>
                </list>

values.name: mail.message.subtype.form
values.arch:
<form string="Email message">
                    <sheet>
                        <group>
                            <group string="Description">
                                <field name="name"/>
                                <field name="sequence"/>
                                <field name="res_model"/>
                                <field name="description"/>
                                <field name="default"/>
                                <field name="internal"/>
                                <field name="hidden"/>
                                <field name="track_recipients"/>
                            </group>
                            <group string="Auto subscription">
                                <field name="parent_id"/>
                                <field name="relation_field"/>
                            </group>
                        </group>
                    </sheet>
                </form>

values.name: mail.message.subtype.view.search
values.arch:
<search>
                    <field name="name"/>
                    <field name="res_model"/>
                    <field name="description"/>
                    <filter string="Default" name="filter_default" domain="[('default', '=', True)]"/>
                </search>
